title: TrustField cloud factory prompt registry record v1

prompt_id.description: lane-prefixed stable id, e.g. tb.sourcing.r3, pa.eval.review-pack, ops.health.narrative

prompt_body_ref.description: path or table ref to the versioned prompt text (body never inlined in registry index)

input_contract.description: JSON Schema of required inputs for a run

output_schema.description: JSON Schema the run output MUST validate against; validation failure = retry then PARTIAL

model_tier.description: determine = deterministic script, no LLM; judgment reserved for evaluation/architecture

cost_class.description: dollars requires founder-activated budget line (L8 approval)

receipt_path.description: where runs land, e.g. ops_receipts.prompt_run (+ optional SSOT mirror path)

rollback_rule.description: e.g. 'previous active version auto-restores on contract-test failure or founder rollback; two versions never active at once'

founder_approval_required_to_activate.description: true when the prompt touches candidates, public copy, or spends dollars

contract_tests_ref.description: CI test path proving input/output contracts
